title: memecylon greenwayi
intro: Memecylon greenwayi is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to Sri Lanka. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The bark of Memecylon greenwayi has been traditionally used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. In herbal preparations, the bark is often combined with other herbs to create remedies for fever, digestive problems, and other health issues.
